title: Matthews Attack on Titan
description: This Modpack aism to give you the best AoT experience using the Shingeki no Craft mod and many others. Please look at the Gallery for the Recourcepack Loadorder Screen.
body:
This Modpack aims to give you the best AoT experience. With stunning visuals from the Photon shader pared with BeyondHorizon. Nights feel scary and days look awesome.

With some other mods that i added it will be the best experience there is.

**Please look at the Gallery for the Recourcepack Loadorder Screen.**
